title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How would you describe your experience at school so far?
What subject have you found most useful in everyday life?
Do you prefer studying alone or in a group? Why?
What's the most important thing you have ever learnt outside of school?
Have you ever taken any courses online? How did you find the experience?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think university is the best option for most young people? Why?
What do you think is the most important skill schools should teach?
Should students be assessed only by exams, or in other ways too?
